Andres Institute of Art.failed_test_comment: Official calendar currently exposes only concert and fundraiser entries, so a qualifying activity dry run would parse 0 rows.

Rochester Museum of Fine Arts.fail_implement: Official pages currently expose exhibitions rather than a dated programs/workshops/talks listing; even a Playwright fetch still resolves to the exhibitions view instead of a parseable activity feed.

Thorne-Sagendorph Art Gallery.fail_implement: Official current-exhibitions page is exhibition-only and the gallery site does not expose a dedicated dated activity or program listing to parse.
